name: 深淵の浴場
description:
あなたは隠された小部屋を見つけた。

不可思議なリズムで変色する、煮えたぎる液体の池から蒸気が立ち昇っている。天井から垂れ下がるフジツボのような塊から粘性の体液が滴り、水面に落ちると身悶えするようにシューッと音を立てた。空気は重く、[blue]塩気[/blue]と[green]生々しい有機物[/green]の臭いが充満している。

最も大きな池の縁に近づくと、水面が波打ち、液体はより一層激しく泡立ち始めた。まるであなたの入浴を待ちわびているかのようだ。

options.title: 入浴する
options.description: 最大HPが[green]2[/green]増加する。[red]3[/red]ダメージを受ける。

options.title: 遠慮する
options.description: HPを[green]10[/green]回復する。

pages.description: 湯の誘惑を振り切り、代わりに池の縁で結晶化した塩を集めた。それを肌に擦り込むと、池の水が苛立ったように泡立ち、激しくうねる。室温が急激に下がり、部屋中の反射する壁が一瞬「虚ろな目でやせ細った自分」を映し出した。何か、自分を生まれ変わらせる機会を逃したかもしれない。そんな感覚が拭いきれない。

pages.description: ついに熱さに耐えきれなくなり、池から勢いよく飛び出した。

液体が肌を焼き、[blue][jitter]凍てつく冷気[/jitter][/blue]と[red][jitter]焼け焦げるような熱[/jitter][/red]が同時に襲いかかる。

水面下で、何かが足に触れた。触手だろうか？ それとも意志を持った水流だろうか？ しかし痛みが引くと、自身の身体が……何というか、より引き締まって、がっしりしたように感じる。池の水は満足げにハミングしているようだ。

抵抗をやめると、意識が[sine][purple]漂い始める……[/purple][/sine]
あなたは[blue]友と語り合い[/blue]、[green]仲間と共に協力して戦い[/green]、[gold]強大な敵に立ち向かう[/gold]己の姿を見た。これは夢か、現実か。あるいはその両方か？ 無数の視線が、あなたとその夢をじっと見つめている。彼らは一体何者だ……？

どれだけの時間が過ぎたのだろうか。あなたは目を覚ました。
香りは薄れ、その影響も消え去っていく。自分を取り戻した今、あなたの頭はかつてないほど冴え渡っていた。

意識を保つのは困難だ。あなたは[blue]確固たる信念[/blue]を強く念じ、そこに精神を繋ぎとめる。

name: 巨大な花
description:
[red][jitter]骨の山[/jitter][/red]の上に、[green]巨大な花[/green]が咲き誇っている。

[sine]さまざまに色を変える花びら[/sine]が脈動し、あなたはその中心部に[aqua]強大な力を持つ花粉の塊[/aqua]があるのを感じ取った。だが、うねる花びらは[red]カミソリのように鋭く[/red]、動きが読めない。

[gold]黄金の蜜[/gold]を採取するだけで良しとすべきだろう。だが、中心にあるお宝にも心を惹かれる……

options.title: 蜜を採取

pages.description:
花の肉から慎重に[gold]蜜[/gold]を集めた。
花びらが怒ったように揺らめいている。

[purple]毒素[/purple]と[red]棘[/red]、そして[green]葉[/green]にやられ、全身が麻痺してボロボロだ。
もうたくさんだ。

[gold]高品質な蜜[/gold]の塊をカバンに押し込み、撤退することにした。

[red][jitter]骨の山[/jitter][/red]の上に、[green]巨大な花[/green]が咲き誇っている。

pages.description:
最後の力を振り絞って飛び込み、[aqua]花粉の中心核[/aqua]を掴み取った！
植物は激しく震え、花びらの色はくすみ、[jitter]ヒリヒリ[/jitter]する感覚が消えていく。

[gold]黄金の蜜[/gold]はただの泥と化した。
花を枯らせてしまったのだ。

[red]カミソリのように鋭い[/red]花びらの層を押し分けて進む。それらは肌を[jitter]ヒリヒリ[/jitter]させる[purple]物質[/purple]で覆われている。これが痛みを麻痺させているのだろうか？

骨の山ができている理由は、恐らくこれなのだろう……

options.title: 蜜を採取
options.description: [blue]75[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。

options.title: さらに奥へ
options.description: さらに奥へ進む。HPを[red]6[/red]失う。

pages.description:
奥へ進むにつれ、ヒリヒリとした感覚は[jitter][red]ズキズキとした脱力感[/red][/jitter]へと変わっていく……

[purple]この花は私を捕食しようとしている。中に入ったのは間違いだったか。[/purple]

description:
[sine][blue]「来ることは、視えておったぞ……！」[/blue][/sine]

[purple]神秘的な小屋[/purple]に入ると、[jitter]しわがれた[/jitter]声が響いてきた。

[sine][blue]「お主の運命がここへ導いたのじゃ。お主の未来と運勢を明らかにせねばならん。我らすべてを救うために！！」[/blue][/sine]
「さあ、[gold]水晶占い[/gold]のコースを選んでおくれ。この免責事項にもサインを頼むぞい」老婆はそう言って、ペンと羊皮紙を取り出した。

name: Darv
description:
...where did I put... Oh!
Come to see my collection!? Take anything from that pile over there, put it to good use!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Here, take one of these forgotten gems with ya!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
I’ve got things to do today!
Take whatever ya want from that pile!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: You’re a beautiful hunk of junk, you know that?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Still keeping at it, I see... Let’s see if we can upgrade ya!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
I’ve been holding on to your friend’s uhh... um.
Nevermind nevermind!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: My scrappy scrapper, forget I said all that!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
The flaming warrior has returned!
I’ve got just the thing for ya!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Good to see ya still kickin’ and bashin’ em heads in!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: I’m still holding on to that heavy blade of yours... but I can’t find no one to restore it.

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: The Ironclad stares at Darv.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Maybe the Architect knows somethin’.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I can tell you’re a serious one. What can I do for ya missy?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Anything to help me kill a most loathsome man.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Very well then... have a gander!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Still on that warpath? I ain’t gonna stop ya!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: This book seems tied to ya, been around longer than you have.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: How did you come into possession of that?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]Scary[/sine] things have a way of ending up in my collection.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: What brings the likes of you up here? Wanna take a look at my collection?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I do enjoy fine wares...

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Yeah!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Back for more your highness?!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: To my new friend, do I have somethin’ for ya!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’m listening!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
I’d give it but the Architect nabbed it from me!!
Help a buddy out! Do me a favor will ya?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Back in the Spire for you too huh?
Can’t resist those shinies right?!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I’ll trade ya somethin’ nice for that trophy you got there!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Pity ya don’t remember all my generosity!
Yeah yeah, you know how Neow is...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Well! Let’s get you equipped for that final showdown or whatevah!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
...where did I put... Oh!
Come to see my collection!? Take anything from that pile over there, put it to good use!

name: 密林
description:
しばらく道を間違えて進んでいたようだ。[green]シダ[/green]や[green]低木[/green]、そして[green]ツタ[/green]が生い茂る、鬱蒼としたジャングルに迷い込んでしまった。特に[green]ツタ[/green]がひどい。疲労困憊の中、暗い幻聴が頭をよぎる。

[sine][purple]「お前は道に迷い、備えもなく、逃れられぬ死が近づいている。」[/purple][/sine]

どうするべきか？

options.title: 意地でも進む
options.description: [gold]デッキ[/gold]からカードを1枚削除する。 HPを[red]11[/red]失う。

options.title: 休憩する
options.description: HPを[green]30% Max[/green]回復する。[red]敵[/red]と戦う。

pages.description:
死ぬほど疲れていたあなたは、仮眠をとることにした……

……が、体の上で[gold][jitter]何かがうごめく[/jitter][/gold]気配に叩き起こされた！

ジャングルを切り開いて進むが、森はどこまでも続いている……

[green]奇妙な果実[/green]や[orange]歯ごたえのある虫[/orange]をかじり、[aqua]光る植物[/aqua]の蜜を飲んで命をつなぐものの、次第に[jitter][red]疑心暗鬼[/red][/jitter]に陥ってゆく……

しかし、ついに開けた場所に出た。小道があり、地面には地図のような落書きがある。
どうやら助かったようだ。

name: ドール・ルーム
description:
あなたは隠し部屋に足を踏み入れた……

部屋中が人形で埋め尽くされている。一つとして同じものはなく、その表情は[green]喜び[/green]から[purple]悲哀[/purple]まで様々だ。着ている服は時代が数世紀に渡ってバラバラで、異界の物とすら思われるものもある。

次第に、[sine][blue]合唱のようなささやき声[/blue][/sine]は大きくなり、やがて[jitter][red]絶叫[/red][/jitter]となって、我先にとあなたを呼び求めるようになった……

どれか一つを選び、一刻も早く立ち去らなければ。

options.title: ランダムに選ぶ
options.description: ランダムな[gold]人形レリック[/gold]を1体獲得する。

options.title: 少しだけ時間をかける
options.description: HPを[red]5[/red]失う。[blue]2[/blue]つの[gold]人形レリック[/gold]から[blue]1[/blue]つを選ぶ。

options.title: 念入りに調べ、最良のものを選ぶ
options.description: HPを[red]15[/red]失う。[blue]3[/blue]つの[gold]人形レリック[/gold]から[blue]1[/blue]つを選ぶ。

pages.description:
[blue]「このワタシに選ばれたこと、光栄に思いなさいよね！」[/blue]
人形は勝ち誇ったように宣言した。

選択する前に、人形を一体ずつ調べていく。

叫び声は[red][jitter]耳をつんざくような大音量[/jitter][/red]に達したが、なんとか完全に発狂してしまう前に選ぶことができた！

温かい声が楽しげに頭の中に響き渡る。
[orange][sine]「ボクと一緒に、最高に楽しい物語を見つけに行こうよ！」[/sine][/orange]

あなたは隠し部屋に足を踏み入れた……

その[sine][purple]ボロボロの人形[/purple][/sine]を手に取った瞬間、すべての声がピタリと止んだ。
この人形は喋らないようだ。

options.title: TAKE
options.description: [gold]a random Relic[/gold]を獲得する。

pages.description:
絶叫が響く中、急いで人形たちを品定めする。

この2つのどちらかが良いだろうか？
[red]精神的な苦痛[/red]で、なかなか集中できない。

name: 光と闇の扉
description:
さっきまで何もなかったはずの場所に、入り口が現れた……

中に入ると、二つの輝く扉と[gold]身なりの良いドアマン[/gold]が待っていた。
「やっと、お客様がいらした！ どうぞどうぞ！ お好きな扉をお選びください！」

[blue]ここは本当にスパイアの中なのか？ それにしてはあまりに綺麗すぎる……[/blue]

options.title: 闇の扉
options.description: [gold]デッキ[/gold]からカードを[blue]1[/blue]枚削除。

pages.description:
[sine][purple]闇の中へと進む……[/purple][/sine]

何も見えない。
だが、それがかえって思考を研ぎ澄ませてくれる……。脳裏にこびりついていた[red]無用な雑念[/red]が消え去っていった。

気がつくと、あなたは[blue]地下ドック[/blue]に立っていた。
どうやって戻ってきたんだ？ 一体何が……？

name: 沈みゆく灯台
description:
岩石と静かな水辺が広がる幻想的な風景を抜けると、[purple]空虚な光[/purple]を放つ、[sine]沈みゆく灯台[/sine]が現れた。

足元に溜まっている[aqua][sine]不気味に発光する水[/sine][/aqua]を瓶に汲むか、崩れかけた灯台をよじ登って[gold]レンズ[/gold]を回収するか。二つに一つだ。

options.title: 水を汲む
options.description: [aqua]燐光のポーション[/aqua]を獲得。

options.title: よじ登る
options.description: [gold]Fresnel Lens[/gold]を獲得。最大HPを[red]13[/red]失う。

pages.description:
手近な瓶を使って[aqua]光る液体[/aqua]を慎重に汲み取った。その横では、灯台が静かに沈んでいく。

中にいなくて本当に良かった。

ずぶずぶと沈んでいく灯台に恐怖を覚えながらも、頂上まで登り詰めた。

[gold]明かりが灯る部屋[/gold]にたどり着き、レンズをこじ開けようとする。だが、[purple]活力を奪う光[/purple]が[jitter][red]生命力を削り取っていく！[/red][/jitter]

ついにレンズをもぎ取ると、灯台はピタリと沈むのをやめた。

[aqua]「ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!」[/aqua]

シェフの腕の1本が、メニュー表を指差した。
全品 1皿 [blue]35[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]

[aqua]「ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!」[/aqua]

中に入ると、[orange]すらっとした多腕のシェフ[/orange]が、器用に[green]一口サイズの料理[/green]を作り、[sine]うねうね動く甲殻でできたベルト[/sine]に乗せている。

シェフの腕の1本が、メニュー表を指差した。
全品 1皿 [blue]35[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]

options.title: シェフを観察する
options.description: [gold]デッキ[/gold]のランダムなカードを1枚[gold]アップグレード[/gold]。

pages.description: お腹も膨れたので、先へ進むことにした。

席には座らず、入り口の影から様子を伺うことにした。

[orange]シェフ[/orange]は動じることなく作業を続けている。その所作と規律を観察し、戦闘において無駄な動きと感情を排除する術を学んだ。

name: 商人（？）
description: A suspicious merchant offers 9 fake relics at 42–58 gold each. Throwing a [gold]Foul Potion[/gold] starts a fight against The Merchant??? (165 HP). Winning rewards [gold]Fake Merchant's Rug[/gold] plus all unsold relics.
preconditions: Requires 100+ gold or a Foul Potion

name: 人型の穴
description:
[jitter]巨大な人型の穴が無数にうがたれた[/jitter]広大な野原が突如として眼前に現れ、あなたは足を止めた。

無数にある穴のうちの一つが、あなたの体格や輪郭と寸分違わず一致している。

[sine][orange]ぴったりだ……[/orange][/sine]

options.title: やめておく
options.description: [gold]デッキ[/gold]からカードを[blue]2[/blue]枚削除。 [red]Normality[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。

options.title: “自分の”穴に入る
options.description: カード1枚に、[purple]完璧な適合[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。

pages.description:
きついが、穴に体を押し込んだ……

奥へ進むほど、[sine][purple]視界は暗くなっていく[/purple][/sine]。
やがて、[gold]かすかな光[/gold]が強くなり、向こう側が見えてきた。

外に出た体に変化はない。だが今や、あなたは[green]生命の深淵なる秘密[/green]を理解していた。

[jitter]巨大な人型の穴が無数にうがたれた[/jitter]広大な野原が突如として眼前に現れ、あなたは足を止めた。

無数にある穴のうちの一つが、あなたの体格や輪郭と寸分違わず一致している。

[sine][orange]ぴったりだ……[/orange][/sine]

options.title: “自分の”穴に入る
options.description: カード1枚に、[purple]完璧な適合[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。

pages.description:
[orange]自分と寸分違わぬ形[/orange]の穴を含め、すべての穴を無視することにした。

なぜ自分は中に入らなかったのだろう？ もし入っていたらどうなっていた？ 前にあそこに入ったことがあったか？ 誰があれを作ったんだ？

[sine][red]何が……誰ガ……ドコ？[/red][/sine]

name: Grave of the Forgotten
description:
There is a single grave with a [jitter][aqua]roiling blue flame[/aqua][/jitter]...

A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it [sine]begging[/sine] to journey with you.

But perhaps it's better for it to face the [red]truth[/red]?

options.title: Locked
options.description: You have no cards with [gold]廃棄[/gold]する that can be [purple]Enchanted[/purple].

options.title: Confront with Truth
options.description: [red]Decay[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。 card that [gold]Exhausts[/gold]1枚に、[purple]魂力[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。

options.title: Accept the Lost Soul
options.description: [gold]ForgottenSoul[/gold]を獲得。

pages.description:
You place your hand on the grave and whisper...

[sine]「Ascend with me...」[/sine]

In response, the flames draw out from the grave and coalesce into a [aqua]burning soul[/aqua] and hover around you loyally.
It knows what you are, and wishes to escort you to your final destination.

You place your hand on the grave and whisper...

[sine]「Your fight is over...」[/sine]

In response, the soul crashes into yours and a [jitter][aqua]SOUL FIGHT[/aqua][/jitter] ensues!
Stunned by the countless battles you have endured, it concedes.

There is a single grave with a [jitter][aqua]roiling blue flame[/aqua][/jitter]...

A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it [sine]begging[/sine] to journey with you.

But perhaps it's better for it to face the [red]truth[/red]?

name: 腹ペコとキノコ
description:
[sine]最後に食事をしたのはいつだったか……
……ん？なんだ、このたまらなくいい匂いは？[/sine]

匂いをたどっていくと、こじんまりとしたキャンプ場にたどりついた。そこには、おいしそうに調理された[green]色とりどりのキノコ[/green]が残されている！ あまりにも空腹なあなたは、食べて大丈夫なキノコかどうか考える余裕もない。
(腹が減りすぎていて、横に冒険者の死体が転がっていることすら目に入らなかった)

options.title: デカいキノコ
options.description: Obtain [gold]デカいキノコ[/gold]. Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer 枚.

options.title: 芳醇なキノコ
options.description: Obtain [gold]芳醇なキノコ[/gold]. Upon pickup, lose [red]15[/red] HP and [gold]アップグレード[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] random 枚.

pages.description:
あなたは[orange]大きなキノコ[/orange]にかぶりついた。歯ごたえがあり、ホクホクしていて、食べ応えがある。だが食べれば食べるほど、腹は減っていく。まるでキノコがこちらの“食欲”を喰らっているかのようだ。

[sine]ああ、うまい……うますぎる……。あなたはドカ食いにより気絶に[red]至って[/red]しまった。[/sine]
この暴食のツケは高くつくことになった。

ほのかに魚介の香りがする、硬めの小さな[green]芳醇なキノコ[/green]をつまんだ……

瞬間、爆発的な活力が体にみなぎった。無性に走り、飛び回り、[gold]猛特訓[/gold]したい衝動に駆られる！
しかし直後、[red][jitter]刺すような痛み[/jitter][/red]があなたを襲う。生き残った菌類が、その最期の瞬間に体内で暴れ回っているのだ。

[sine]最後に食事をしたのはいつだったか……
……ん？なんだ、このたまらなくいい匂いは？[/sine]

匂いをたどっていくと、こじんまりとしたキャンプ場にたどりついた。そこには、おいしそうに調理された[green]色とりどりのキノコ[/green]が残されている！ あまりにも空腹なあなたは、食べて大丈夫なキノコかどうか考える余裕もない。
(腹が減りすぎていて、横に冒険者の死体が転がっていることすら目に入らなかった)

options.description: Obtain [gold]デカいキノコ[/gold]. Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer 枚.

options.title: 芳醇なキノコ
options.description: Obtain [gold]芳醇なキノコ[/gold]. Upon pickup, lose [red]15[/red] HP and [gold]アップグレード[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] random 枚.

pages.description:
[green]キノコの盛り合わせ[/green]が一番美味しそうだったので、それに手を伸ばした。

[red][jitter]「俺のキノコに触れるな！！」[/jitter][/red]

死体だと思っていた冒険者が突如として襲いかかってきた！ あなたはそいつを返り討ちにして気絶させ、残りのご馳走を平らげた。罪悪感というスパイスと共に。

name: 寄生されたオートマトン
description:
[red]壊れたオートマトンたち[/red]で埋め尽くされた部屋がある。

その中の一体は、まだ[sine][aqua]かすかに光るコア[/aqua][/sine] を残している。だが、グロテスクな生体組織に侵食されており、反応はない。

options.title: 調査する
options.description: ランダムな[gold]パワー[/gold]を1枚獲得する。

options.title: コアに触れる
options.description: ランダムな[gold]0コストのカード[/gold]を1枚獲得する。

pages.description:
[red]壊れたオートマトンたち[/red]で埋め尽くされた部屋がある。

その中の一体は、まだ[sine][aqua]かすかに光るコア[/aqua][/sine] を残している。だが、グロテスクな生体組織に侵食されており、反応はない。

options.title: 調査する
options.description: ランダムな[gold]パワー[/gold]を1枚獲得する。

options.title: コアに触れる
options.description: ランダムな[gold]0コストのカード[/gold]を1枚獲得する。

pages.description:
[aqua]光るオートマトン[/aqua]の内部構造を調査すると、一つ発見があった。特定の金属とその配置が、様々な状態異常への耐性を持つようだ！

あなたはその[blue]テクノロジー[/blue]を自身に適用した。

[aqua]コア[/aqua]に軽く触れた瞬間、[jitter][gold]電流[/gold]が体を駆け巡った[/jitter]。

慌ててその場を離れたが、そのショックで自分の何かが[sine][purple]変質した[/purple][/sine]ように感じる。

name: ジャングル大迷宮のクエスト
description:
In a clearing, you run into a [green]Ragtag Group of Adventurers[/green] looking down and gesturing at a [purple]gigantic maze[/purple].

They offer to join forces with you in an [b]Epic Quest[/b] to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with [red][jitter]deadly traps[/jitter][/red] and [orange][sine]guardians[/sine][/orange].

It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.

options.title: ソロプレイを貫く
options.description: [blue]135-165[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。 HPを[red]18[/red]失う。

options.title: パーティーを組む
options.description: [blue]35-65[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。

pages.description:
In a clearing, you run into a [green]Ragtag Group of Adventurers[/green] looking down and gesturing at a [purple]gigantic maze[/purple].

They offer to join forces with you in an [b]Epic Quest[/b] to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with [red][jitter]deadly traps[/jitter][/red] and [orange][sine]guardians[/sine][/orange].

It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.

options.title: ソロプレイを貫く
options.description: [blue]135-165[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。 HPを[red]18[/red]失う。

options.title: パーティーを組む
options.description: [blue]35-65[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。

pages.description:
Everyone's face immediately lights up, including your own!

One of the adventurers turns out to be a bard!
You merrily waltz into the maze as [aqua]Aquid the squid wizard[/aqua] effortlessly disarms traps, while you and the [red]Grathorian fighter[/red] take out the [orange]spiky club-wielding guards[/orange] with ease.

This was the most joyous adventure of your life and you've made some truly [gold][sine]Great Memories[/sine][/gold].

人付き合いが面倒なあなたは、露骨に嫌な顔をする彼らの脇を無言で通り過ぎた。中には[jitter][purple]拳を振り上げて怒る[/purple][/jitter]者もいた。

……だが、迷宮の歓迎は凄まじかった。トゲの落とし穴に落ち、トゲ付きの巨大な丸太に殴られ、道中ずっと[orange]トゲ付き棍棒を振り回す凶暴なバケモノ[/orange]と戦いを繰り広げる羽目になった。

Yもうトゲはこりごりだ。次の冒険ではチームワークを大事にしようと心に誓った。

name: The Lost Wisp
description:
In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of [sine][red]deceased insects[/red][/sine], surrounding what looks to be a [orange]small glowing mote[/orange].
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!

You move closer to investigate.

options.title: Capture the Wisp
options.description: [red]Decay[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。 [gold]Lost Wisp[/gold]を獲得する。

options.title: Search the Nearby Area
options.description: [blue]45-75[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。

pages.description:
You approach the [orange]Wisp[/orange] cautiously...
The closer you get, the more it reacts to your presence.

When in arm's reach, you grasp the [orange]Wisp[/orange] but it [red][jitter]scalds you with a blast of hot steam and flame![/jitter][/red]

Still, you [jitter]fumble and wrestle[/jitter] the creature into submission. Eventually, the [orange]Wisp[/orange] concedes and recognizes you as its new owner.

In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of [sine][red]deceased insects[/red][/sine], surrounding what looks to be a [orange]small glowing mote[/orange].
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!

You move closer to investigate.

options.title: Capture the Wisp
options.description: [red]Decay[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。 [gold]Lost Wisp[/gold]を獲得する。

options.title: Search the Nearby Area
options.description: [blue]45-75[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。

pages.description:
You decide to leave the little one alone. Better play it safe!

Not much is in the area, but you find some [gold]ゴールド[/gold] scattered amongst the dead bugs.
You don't seek an answer.

name: Luminous Choir
description:
You stumble upon a clearing bathed in an unnatural blue glow. Towering mushrooms pulse with bioluminescence, their caps swollen and glistening. As you approach, the fungi begin to emit [sine][purple]haunting, melodic tones[/purple][/sine] that reverberate throughout your chest.

You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, [sine]pulsing[/sine] in rhythm with the fungal song.

options.title: Reach into the Flesh
options.description: [gold]デッキ[/gold]からカードを[blue]2[/blue]枚削除。 [red]Spore Mind[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。

options.title: Offer Tribute
options.description: [red]100-149[/red][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を支払う。 ランダムな[gold]レリック[/gold]を1個獲得する。

options.title: Locked
options.description: [blue]100-149[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]が必要。

pages.description: Placing gold upon the spongy ground. The coins slowly sink as tendrils gently push the relic to the surface, allowing a clean retrieval.

You plunge your hand directly into the spongy tissue of the dominant mushroom to extract the relic within. The fungal network shudders at your intrusion, and your mind [sine]quivers[/sine] in response.

name: Morphic Grove
description:
You enter a grove of [green]crystalline trees[/green], and they begin to [jitter]quiver excitedly[/jitter]!
A chorus of [sine]hellos and welcomes[/sine] bombard you as a group of [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] [jitter]burst[/jitter] forth from trees.

One of the [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.

Approach the group or the loner?

options.title: Group
options.description: [gold]ゴールド[/gold]を[red]100[/red]失う。 [gold]変化[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards.

options.title: Loner
options.description: 最大HPが[green]5[/green]増加。

pages.description:
You greet the chittering [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] and they embrace you into their crystally arms.

They share their combined knowledge and inject you with [sine]Morphic Magic[/sine], changing your nature... Such lovely creatures, these [aqua]Morphics[/aqua].

[red]One of them stole your[/red] [gold]ゴールド[/gold][red].[/red]

You enter a grove of [green]crystalline trees[/green], and they begin to [jitter]quiver excitedly[/jitter]!
A chorus of [sine]hellos and welcomes[/sine] bombard you as a group of [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] [jitter]burst[/jitter] forth from trees.

One of the [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.

Approach the group or the loner?

options.title: Group
options.description: [gold]ゴールド[/gold]を[red]100[/red]失う。 [gold]変化[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards.

options.title: Loner
options.description: 最大HPが[green]5[/green]増加。

pages.description:
You reach out a hand to the lone [aqua]Morphic[/aqua], sympathizing with its nature.
It gifts you a tiny crystal fruit, and you consume it, as is custom.

The fruit clarifies your mind and purpose. You give thanks, then make your way onwards.

name: Neow
description:
[sine]I’ve... remade you....
...go... ..up.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]...hello... ..again.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
[sine]...awaken...
..Awaken.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
[sine]..receive.... this....
..blessing.. ...go......[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]..I’ve... ..brought... ..you back...[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]...kill.. the... [red][jitter]ARCHITECT[/jitter][/red][/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[sine]..arise.. my.. warrior...
..time... to fight...again...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]..still.. lost.. to rage... good...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[sine]..remember.. the.. first..time
...you ..came...before me..[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]..so..furious...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]...so..useful...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]...we.... share... ..the same... ..goal....[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: [jitter]HE KILLED ALL THAT I LOVE!![/jitter]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]...my power..... is yours...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]He... still.. ....breathes...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: [sine]Is... it.. ...even... possible...?[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
[sine]... [red]Architect[/red].... ..weakening....
..we.... stronger...[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Oversized blue creature, I am the future [orange]King[/orange]!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
[sine]..cute...
...you... will see.. ..me... ...again....[/sine]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [sine]...again..?[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: [jitter]Why can’t I win?![/jitter]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [sine]...receive.. this... ..blessing...[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: ...yes, thank you Neow.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]...returned.. from... outside?
..knew... you’d... be back...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]...your..
 ...trophy.. awaits...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: [sine]..both...know..agony..of..family...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]..still...seeking..approval...?
...[jitter]FOOLISH[/jitter]...[/sine]

name: Nonupeipe
description:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Madness awaits at the top. Don my power and vanquish.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
You’ve traveled so far to reach me!
Come closer, receive my blessing.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Could a construct truly be worthy of my blessings?
Come forward, Defect. You will be the most beautiful of all automata.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: My poor, battered machine, let me refine you.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: I usually don’t like the Architect’s things, but I admit you’re growing on me.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Ah, the Ironclad finally arrives before me.
Come forth and I shall endow you with my power.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Ironclad ironclad... was my previous gift not enough?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
You return again my champion? How many times?
Were you not strong enough to wipe out entire clans before?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Your guards are dead, rumors say you can bestow blessings for those who wish the Architect dead.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
I appreciate someone capable and shall grant a measure of my power.
Next time, don’t kill my guards.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: A mage needs fine accouterments for battle. Come forth, Necrobinder.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: The Architect won’t be pleased to see that [sine]pet[/sine] of yours.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Do you mean Osty? He will be the one to deliver the final blow.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I seek audience with Nonupeipe!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Such beautiful robes you’ve brought from faraway lands!
Have your minions bring you closer and I will bless thee.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Royal blessings for royal visitors.
Servants! Fetch some tea for us.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: The Architect has gone mad! If only a noble champion could save us from this plight...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
Fear not! I, the Regent, will put an end to the madness!
But first, tea!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
A little thief has snuck into my domain?
Don’t think I can’t see you? Come on out!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: The Silent steps out of the shadows...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
A huntress, what beckons your return to the Spire?
Approach and don these blessings.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I have prepared gifts for you, assassin, don’t be shy.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Of all of her puppets, you surprise me most.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
What took your first life? Did Neow [sine]find[/sine] you?
A shame you don’t speak.

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.

name: Orobas
description: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Try this!!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Very good finds!! Look look!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
What! Servant construct?! Still working!!
Why here? Why not at Factory??

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Core broken? Neow use broken construct?
Manipulated?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: An Ironclad!? How possible?? Scary. Very scary!!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Contract signer? Why!? Bad choice? Yes. Mistake!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Wishing you freedom!! Wishing hard!
Vakuu bad. Very bad! Architect free you?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Dead?! Not dead! Why puppet? Big hand!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
I’m no puppet. There’s a man I must kill.
What can you do for me?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Killing bad!! Take this instead!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Not dead one! Good gifts for you!! Violence bad.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: No violence! Collect shiny instead... Shiny!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
My quest will only end when the Architect is no more.
Violence is inevitable.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Architect not bad! Maybe talk? Talking good!! Very good!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Traveller! From space!? Where in space?
How from space? Pointy head! Little friends!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: The Regent monologues for hours.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Exciting! Impressive!! More! More!!!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
More stories! Found these for you!
Now tell more story!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
My number one fan! Orobas, friend!
Lovely to see you’re still alive!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Stories?!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Of course of course... but have you found any trinkets for me?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Infection...? [jitter]BLIGHT!?[/jitter] Take and go!!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: [sine]...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Not contagious? Very dying? Architect help you?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Where sisters? Scary mean sisters!
Be good person! Don’t be like sisters!!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!

name: Pael
description:
A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Welcome back friend. Let my flesh help you...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Pael is sleeping. His snoring shakes the room.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Troubled automaton, looking for your friend?
Let me help...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Do constructs dream?
Watch and copy me...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
I dreamt of your friend...
Father can restore [aqua]Flaw[/aqua]...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: You contain such rage. Take from me and find some peace...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Do you remember how it feels to dream?
It is good to sleep...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
You must quell your flames.
Father can free you...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Such malice paints your heart.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: We would share the same paint if you knew what’s befallen me.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
There is no peace on your path.
Take a part of me to ease your burdens...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
The one with the Hand returns.
Painful memories. Take my strength and leave...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Killing [red]Father[/red] won’t bring peace.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: You call that [jitter]thing[/jitter] your father!?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: We do not choose our family...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
Hello! I am the Regent.
Hellooo?? [jitter]HELLO!?[/jitter]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Quiet down now.
Take a part of me and be on your way...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
I’m back! Ah, you’re asleep of course.
Let’s see here...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Why do you give yourself away?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Why not give when I have an abundance of flesh?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
When you return, I will be replenished anew.
That’s what sleep does...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Murderous creature, no need for violence here.
Have part of me and find peace...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Trophy hunting? Sure, take a part of me...
Whatever grants you comfort...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
You’ve poisoned me...?
What is this going to...? zZZzz...

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...

name: Potion Courier
description:
There is a [sine]sour[/sine] smell in the air and shortly after, you find a [gold]Potion Courier[/gold] collapsed on the ground.
Unmoving. Lifeless. [jitter]Dead!?[/jitter]
While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of [green][sine]Foul Smelling Potions[/sine][/green] with a note: "Recipient: Merchant".

options.description: Procure [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Foul Potions[/gold].

options.title: Ransack
options.description: Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Uncommon Potion[/gold].

Should you try to nab it?

You put your dukes up.

You successfully nab the relic!

...or so you thought. A right-hook [jitter][red]clocks you in the face[/red][/jitter].

You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]「We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!」[/sine]

You do not know this man.

He downs the [gold]Potion[/gold] in one go.

[sine]「Exemplary...」[/sine]

Ranwid observes the relic studiously for several minutes...

Then eats the [gold]Relic[/gold].

pages.description:
You concentrate and identify a giant seamless mirror in front of you.
With a swift kick you [jitter]SHATTER[/jitter] the giant mirror!
Right as you shatter the mirror your reflection braces [pronounObject]self as [pronounSubject] becomes a thousand beautiful glittering shards.

How can a place like this exist?

You reach forth and meld into the reflection in front of you.
[sine]Which one am I?[/sine]

description:
You turn a corner and suddenly, a shadowy figure is just standing there. He pivots to face you.

「Welcome! What're ya trading?」
The figure inquires as he flares open his cloak to reveal a slew of [sine][purple]suspicious wares[/purple][/sine].

name: Room Full of Cheese
description:
This room is full of [b][jitter]cheese!!![/jitter][/b]

You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more [b]cheese[/b]. The candles in this room appear to be made of [b]cheese[/b]. The furniture is also [b]cheese[/b].
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.

It is made of [b]cheese[/b].

options.title: Gorge
options.description: Choose [blue]2[/blue] of [blue]8[/blue] random [gold]Common[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]デッキ[/gold].

options.title: Search
options.description: HPを[red]14[/red]失う。 [gold]Chosen Cheese[/gold]を獲得する。

pages.description:
You take a little nibble of [b]cheese[/b] but this fuels you to eat even more [b]cheese[/b].

[sine]Time passes...[/sine]

 You have eaten an awe-inspiring amount of [b]cheese[/b].
Tonight, dreams will be [b]cheese[/b].

pages.description:
You scrounge about for [sine]hours and hours...[/sine]

Time slips by as your mind travels to strange places from the sheer presence of all this [b]cheese[/b], and you fade into a stupor....
You snap awake and realize you're holding something.

[b]The Chosen Cheese.[/b]

name: The Round Tea Party
description:
You find an [orange]invitation[/orange] for a [blue]「Sir Galalot」[/blue] to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.

Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of [gold]commanders[/gold], [aqua]generals[/aqua], [red]warlords[/red], and [blue]mercenaries[/blue] having... tea?
The gigantic knight donning a [gold]golden crown[/gold] speaks.

[jitter]「Thou art late for [b]Tea[/b]?!」[/jitter]

options.title: Enjoy Your Tea
options.description: Obtain [red]Royal Poison[/red]. [green]Heal to full HP.[/green]

options.title: Pick a Fight
options.description: HPを[red]11[/red]失う。 ランダムな[gold]レリック[/gold]を1個獲得する。

pages.description:
The patrons stare wide-eyed at the corpse of one of their regulars... then [jitter]bursts into applause!?[/jitter]

「We were wondering how to rid of [red]Sir Wygore[/red], incredible work!」

They dump out your [green]poisoned tea[/green] and you discuss [orange]tactics[/orange] and [purple]secrets[/purple] all night. A most excellent tea party.

You grab a teacup and down it one go.
It's [jitter][red]SCALDING HOT[/red][/jitter] but you don't change your expression. The patrons are stunned by your lack of self preservation.

「We meant no offense, [blue]Sir Galalot[/blue]. our sincerest apologies.」

You enjoy some tea and crumpets, unaware of the [green]poison[/green] you've ingested.

「At least pay the [gold]entrance fee[/gold] if you want to live.」

You jump onto the table and [jitter]kick[/jitter] the [red]warlord knight[/red] in the face!
 The knight lets out a haunting shriek and keels over.

[jitter][purple]*everyone gasps*[/purple][/jitter]

name: Sapphire Seed
description:
You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua]! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!?

Legends say that consuming one can greatly [gold]amplify your endurance[/gold], but what if you plant and nourish it instead?

options.title: Consume
options.description: HPを[green]9[/green]回復する。  [gold]デッキ[/gold]のカードを1枚[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する

options.title: Plant and Nourish
options.description: カード1枚に、[purple]種まき[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。

pages.description:
You ingest the [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua] and within moments your [blue]limbs feel more agile[/blue], [gold]colors sharpen[/gold], and you [purple][sine]sense the souls of nearby foes[/sine][/purple].

Good thing you didn't step on it.

options.title: Plant and Nourish

pages.description:
You scour the [green]Overgrowth[/green] and find a pot with [blue]good aeration[/blue]. Then, you trek around, searching for an untouched spot where [orange]light peeks through a cracked wall[/orange]. Carefully, you reinforce the pot with bark and vine to [green]camouflage[/green] it, fill it with loamy, nutrient-rich soil, and nestle the [aqua]seed[/aqua] just beneath the surface.

Finally, you gather dew from nearby plants and pour it over the soil.

[sine]Grow big, little seed...[/sine]
Unknowingly, the [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua] attaches to you spiritually.
Thankful of your hard work.

On the floor lies a tome,
「Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire」

The book is [red]encrusted with blood[/red] so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.

Will you read it?

pages.description: You don't particularly care for books, let alone blood-encrusted ones.

What an engrossing read! Some choice quotes remain fresh in your mind:
「Avoid big monsters.」
「Take every card.」
「Blocking is for cowards.」

Your hands are covered in [red]blood[/red].

You flip to a random page:
「Defense 101: Don't get hit!」

You read the rest of the passage and it's surprisingly illuminating. You incorporate these ideas into your battle tactics.

You flip the book over and read the summary:
[blue]「Critics and Cultists agree that sharp and pointy weapons are the best way to inflict damage!」[/blue]

There's a price sticker on the back of the book, crossed out and marked with a greatly reduced price.

name: Spiraling Whirlpool
description:
You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?

options.title: Observe
options.description: [gold]ストライク[/gold]か[gold]防御[/gold]1枚に、[purple]Spiral[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。

options.title: Drink
options.description: HPを[green]33% Max[/green]回復する。

pages.description:
You cup your hands and dip it into the [sine][aqua]Spiraling Whirlpool[/aqua][/sine].

Its waters fill your hands at a gentle rate as you take small sips with your eyes closed.

Delicious water [sine]spirals[/sine] through you to your [gold]Center[/gold], washing away harmful thoughts and physical ailments...

You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?

options.title: Observe
options.description: [gold]ストライク[/gold]か[gold]防御[/gold]1枚に、[purple]Spiral[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。

options.title: Drink
options.description: HPを[green]33% Max[/green]回復する。

pages.description:
[sine][purple]...ah-   so beautiful.....
So it spins... still spinning around. Yes...
Oh! Was that..... a little splash...?
....of course. You deserve some fun, too[/purple] [aqua]Mr. Spiral[/aqua][purple]... haha...
... .......   ...[/purple][/sine]

It's time to go now.
You whisper something as you take your leave.

[gold]「Thank you, Spiral.」[/gold]

name: Spirit Grafter
description:
Above, a cocoon is [jitter]shaking and wriggling[/jitter], about to burst forth!

...it stops wriggling. [orange][sine]The cocoon ignites[/sine][/orange]! [jitter]What is going on?[/jitter]
In a flash of [gold]light[/gold] and [red]flame[/red], a [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] rushes into you, threatening to merge with your being to become complete.

options.title: Let It In
options.description: HPを[green]25[/green]回復する。 [gold]Metamorphosis[/gold]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。

options.title: Rejection
options.description: HPを[red]9[/red]失う。 [gold]デッキ[/gold]からカードを1枚削除する。

pages.description:
The [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] merges with you. The vital kindred spirit swiftly [green]heals[/green] you up.

You are [blue]reborn[/blue].

The [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] is easily stopped by your will.

However, it repeatedly flies into you, desperate for a host. Its strength runs out and it dissolves with a [purple][sine]poof[/sine][/purple].

[sine]A fleeting spirit.[/sine]

name: Stone of All Time
description:
A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.

A plaque reads:
[gold][b]Stone of All Time[/b][/gold].

Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this [blue]Stone[/blue] and that it has never moved from this spot.

options.title: Drink and Lift
options.description: Lose [red]a random Potion[/red]. Gain [blue]10[/blue] Max HP.

options.title: Locked
options.description: Requires a Potion.

options.title: Locked
options.description: Requires an Attack.

options.title: Push
options.description: HPを[red]6[/red]失う。 [gold]Enchant[/gold] an Attack with [purple]Vigorous[/purple] [blue]8[/blue].

pages.description:
You slam the [gold]a random Potion[/gold] down and [jitter]lift with all your might[/jitter]!!

Nothing happens.

You [jitter]push and push[/jitter] with everything you've got!!

Nothing happens.

name: The Sunken Statue
description:
You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a [blue]stone sword[/blue].

Something is also [gold][sine]glittering[/sine][/gold] at the bottom of the pond.
Votive offerings perhaps?

You could really use some money...

options.title: Grab the Sword
options.description: [gold]Sword of Stone.[/gold]を獲得する。

options.title: Dive into the Water
options.description: [blue]101-121[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。 HPを[red]7[/red]失う。

pages.description:
You plunge deep into the water!

While collecting the [gold]offerings[/gold] you hear a [sine][blue]dull echo[/blue][/sine] and you're struck by stones!

Once you surface, you see that the old statue had crumbled due to your disturbance; [red]physical[/red] and [purple]spiritual[/purple].

You [jitter]wrest[/jitter] the [blue]sword[/blue] out of the statue's hands and the whole thing crumbles apart!

It's too dangerous to pick up whatever was [gold][jitter]glittering[/jitter][/gold] at the bottom of the pond now...

Inspecting the [blue]sword[/blue], you sense an incredible [green]dormant power[/green] within.

You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a [blue]stone sword[/blue].

Something is also [gold][sine]glittering[/sine][/gold] at the bottom of the pond.
Votive offerings perhaps?

You could really use some money...

name: Sunken Treasury
description:
A path leads you into a partially submerged vault.
There are [blue]2[/blue] [gold]chests[/gold] but only [blue]1[/blue] [jitter][purple]brittle key[/purple][/jitter].

[gold]The First Chest:[/gold] Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold.
[gold]The Second Chest:[/gold] Enormous, ornate, and clearly [red]cursed[/red]. Lots of gold!

options.title: First Chest
options.description: [blue]52-67[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。

options.title: Second Chest
options.description: [blue]303-363[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。[red]強欲[/red]を受け取る。

pages.description: Yup, there was [gold]ゴールド[/gold] in it.

A path leads you into a partially submerged vault.
There are [blue]2[/blue] [gold]chests[/gold] but only [blue]1[/blue] [jitter][purple]brittle key[/purple][/jitter].

[gold]The First Chest:[/gold] Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold.
[gold]The Second Chest:[/gold] Enormous, ornate, and clearly [red]cursed[/red]. Lots of gold!

options.title: Second Chest
options.description: [blue]303-363[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。[red]強欲[/red]を受け取る。

pages.description:
You've never seen so much [gold]ゴールド[/gold] in one place!

[sine]All of the [/sine][blue]Merchant's[/blue][sine] wares can be bought...[/sine]
[Monologue]
[sine]Dangerous thugs can be paid off...[/sine]

The [red][sine]feverishly greedy[/sine][/red] thoughts stay with you forever...

name: Symbiote
description:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.

[sine]Approach...[/sine]

options.title: Locked
options.description: None of your Attacks can be Enchanted.

options.title: Approach
options.description: Attack1枚に、[purple]腐敗[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。

options.title: Kill with Fire
options.description: カードを1枚選び、[gold]変化[/gold]させる。

pages.description:
It suddenly jumps onto you. You feel a searing pain as it latches onto your arm, but in an instant it is gone.

...? Where did it go?

Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.

[sine]Approach...[/sine]

options.title: Locked
options.description: None of your Attacks can be Enchanted.

options.title: Approach
options.description: Attack1枚に、[purple]腐敗[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。

options.title: Kill with Fire
options.description: カードを1枚選び、[gold]変化[/gold]させる。

pages.description:
You torch the dark polyp. As it screeches and burns into ashes, your head pulses painfully but you manage not to faint.
What was that thing?

name: Tablet of Truth
description:
You defeat a pair of [blue]Guardian Kin[/blue] and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a [purple][sine]tablet with familiar inscriptions[/sine][/purple]. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its [green]healing energies[/green] instead.

options.title: Decipher
options.description: 最大HPを[red]3[/red]失う。 ランダムなカードを1枚[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。

options.title: Smash
options.description: HPを[green]20[/green]回復する。

options.title: Give Up
options.description: Stop reading the text and leave.

pages.description:
As you begin deciphering the tablet, the [blue]Kin's Mantra[/blue] speaks to you.

「The [gold]Truth[/gold] is everything...」

options.title: Continue Deciphering
options.description: 最大HPを[red]3[/red]失う。 ランダムなカードを1枚[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。

pages.description:
You feel faint from all this reading!

[purple][sine]Heroes weren't meant to read for such an extended period of time...[/sine][/purple]

options.title: Keep Deciphering
options.description: 最大HPを[red]3[/red]失う。 ランダムなカードを1枚[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。

pages.description:
[sine][red]You're barely holding on...[/red][/sine]
The tablet is nearly deciphered. The [blue]Mantra[/blue] holds the truth... 

[jitter]THE TRUTH!! WHAT IS THE TRUTH!?[/jitter]

options.title: KEEP DECIPHERING
options.description: 最大HPを[red]3[/red]失う。 ランダムなカードを1枚[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。

pages.description:
In a trance, you decipher the remaining text, abandoning mind and body. [purple][sine]The spiritual pursuit of the [gold]Truth[/gold] is all that matters.[/sine][/purple]

Or does it? One final word remains...
[jitter]It will cost everything.[/jitter]

options.title: Lose Everything
options.description: Set Max HP to [red]1[/red]. [gold]Upgrade ALL[/gold] cards.

pages.description:
[red][jitter]Everything was spent[/jitter][/red] to decipher the [gold]Final Word[/gold] and you black out...
When you come to, you realize something is etched into the floor.

[b]「Air」[/b]
You stop all this reading and deciphering. Your body normalizes, though you can't help but wonder what the [gold]Truth[/gold] was.

You defeat a pair of [blue]Guardian Kin[/blue] and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a [purple][sine]tablet with familiar inscriptions[/sine][/purple]. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its [green]healing energies[/green] instead.

options.title: Decipher
options.description: 最大HPを[red]3[/red]失う。 ランダムなカードを1枚[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。

options.title: Smash
options.description: HPを[green]20[/green]回復する。

pages.description:
The tablet is [jitter][red]smashed to pieces[/red][/jitter], energy expelled from the tablet seeps into your body.

[green]You feel refreshed![/green]

name: Tanx
description:
SO WEAK! BUT YOU HAVE POTENTIAL!
USE THIS WEAPON!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: GROW STRONGER SO WE CAN FIGHT!!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: YOU CAN NEVER HAVE TOO MANY WEAPONS!!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: IMPRESSIVE SWORD, WARRIOR! YOU CAN USE MORE WEAPONS!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: WEAPONS FOR THE WARRIOR! GRAB A WEAPON! LET’S FIGHT!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: FIGHT ME, IRONCLAD!!

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: The Ironclad fights Tanx.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: YEEES!! MIGHTY FIGHT, TAKE WEAPON!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: WHAT A MIGHTY SCYTHE!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Yes, it’s special-made for vengeance.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: DOES THE HAND NEED A WEAPON!?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: FIGHT ME, OSTY!!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: FIGHT ME, NECROBINDER!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: The Necrobinder and Osty scuffle with Tanx.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: MIGHTY TEAMWORK!! HAVE A WEAPON!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: ORANGE!? HOW IS THIS BEING ORANGE!??

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: All know that orange is the most regal color!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: INCREDIBLE! SO MIGHTY!!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: ORANGE ONE!! CHOOSE A MIGHTY WEAPON!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: FIGHT ME, REGENT!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: No! We fought last time I was here!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: FIGHT ME AGAIN!!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: A HUNTRESS! I WILL SHARPEN YOUR CLAW!!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: WHY DAGGERS!! UNMIGHTY!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: FIGHT ME, SILENT!!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: The Silent escapes, stealing a weapon on the way.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: WHERE DID YOU GO!!!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
SO WEAK! BUT YOU HAVE POTENTIAL!
USE THIS WEAPON!!

name: Tea Master
description:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.

The man inside gestures to a selection of [green]teas[/green], each neatly labeled with a [gold]premium price[/gold].

options.title: Bone Tea
options.description: [red]50[/red][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を支払う。 At the start of the next combat, [gold]アップグレード[/gold] your starting hand.

options.title: Locked
options.description: [blue]50[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]が必要。

options.title: Ember Tea
options.description: [red]150[/red][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を支払う。 At the start of the next [blue]5[/blue] combats, [gold]筋力[/gold][blue]2[/blue]を得る.

options.title: Locked
options.description: [blue]150[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]が必要。

options.title: Tea of Discourtesy
options.description: At the start of the next combat, shuffle [blue]2[/blue] [gold]めまい[/gold] into your [gold]山札[/gold].

pages.description:
The [blue]tea master[/blue] acknowledges your request and begins.

[gold]1.[/gold] Water from a charcoal-filled carafe is ladled into a kettle.
[gold]2.[/gold] The kettle is heated using a gentle [purple]violet flame[/purple].
[gold]3.[/gold] A scoop of tea goes into the kettle before it boils.
[gold]4.[/gold] Off the heat, and a series of rhythmic claps track the time.
[gold]5.[/gold] The kettle is hoisted high and precisely poured into a tiny cup.

[green][sine]「Tea is served.」[/sine][/green]

You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.

The man inside gestures to a selection of [green]teas[/green], each neatly labeled with a [gold]premium price[/gold].

options.title: Bone Tea
options.description: [red]50[/red][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を支払う。 At the start of the next combat, [gold]アップグレード[/gold] your starting hand.

options.title: Locked
options.description: [blue]50[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]が必要。

options.title: Ember Tea
options.description: [red]150[/red][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を支払う。 At the start of the next [blue]5[/blue] combats, [gold]筋力[/gold][blue]2[/blue]を得る.

options.title: Locked
options.description: [blue]150[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]が必要。

options.title: Tea of Discourtesy
options.description: At the start of the next combat, shuffle [blue]2[/blue] [gold]めまい[/gold] into your [gold]山札[/gold].

pages.description:
You politely decline the tea and—

[jitter][red]*SLAM*[/red][/jitter]

The door behind you slams shut. The [blue]tea master[/blue] stares at you for a moment, then presents an ugly cup.
Oh, this tea is for the discourteous...

name: Tezcatara
description:
Oh, a visitor! Do come in, dear!
What can Tezcatara do for you?

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Welcome back, sweetie. Let me [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] away your flaws.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Do come in, dear! What can Tezcatara do for you today?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Not here to annoy me? What an [jitter][b]unusual[/b][/jitter] little construct...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Now how silly would it be if he were unmade by one of his own?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Are you sure you want to be fixed up?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: You [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] so pretty! Come in, come in!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Such a strong boy you are! Come and eat something.
Can’t [jitter][b]slaughter[/b][/jitter] on an empty stomach!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Ohh, Architect still alive? Kill him [jitter][b]quickly[/b][/jitter] would you?
I’ll be waiting right here!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Now what’s a skeleton doing inside these walls?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
My aim is simple. Vengeance for my family.
I’ll reach the top and make him pay.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [jitter][b]Wonderful[/b][/jitter]!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Come in, come in! Let’s make your flames burn [jitter][b]brighter[/b][/jitter].

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Those flames around you remind me of something forbidden.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: What do you know?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I know who wrote that [jitter][b]book[/b][/jitter].

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Oh my, what an [jitter][b]exotic[/b][/jitter] visitor! Who might you be, sweetie?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’m no sweetie! Address me with respect, giant... thing-person!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Where are my manners?
Tezcatara cackles with delight.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
You and your friends are back again?
I’ve made [jitter][b]treats[/b][/jitter] for you!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Welcome back regal boy! Looks like you’re doing [jitter][b]great[/b][/jitter] out there.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Yes of course! Just some minor setbacks at the upper levels... like dying.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: We all need to learn from our mistakes.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Come closer, quiet one. I can’t see well...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: You can [jitter][b]trust[/b][/jitter] me.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Such a nasty [jitter][b]sickness[/b][/jitter] you have. Let’s take care of you.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I’ve met your sisters, you know? Such lovely girls they are.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Oh dear... you haven’t been [jitter][b]fighting[/b][/jitter] have you?

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
Oh, a visitor! Do come in, dear!
What can Tezcatara do for you?

name: The Architect
description: So the arch demon’s thrall has arrived?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: You’re back? Didn’t I dismantle you?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Fix you? Fix your friend? Ridiculous.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: How do you keep coming back? Is this Neow’s doing?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: So the arch demon’s thrall has arrived?

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text:
Enemy...
Kill...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Cursed to fight forever, aren’t you?

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: Architect... arch... enemy!!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Do you even know your name?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: I pity you.

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: Kill...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Return to the bottom, Ironclad.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my LIFE! ...and now I will kill YOU!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Vengeance is it? No thank you.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my-

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: You cannot change the past with anger.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my LIFE-

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I did what I must to maintain order.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my-

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Life

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: What...?! Die, monster!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’ve arrived! You there, commoner! Is this the top?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: I need quiet...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’ll teach you some manners!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’ve arrived again!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: The loud fool returns?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’m neither loud nor a fool! Face me!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’ve had enough of your poor manners!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Something we can both agree on.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Let’s dance!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Not even an introduction?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Where did you come from?
What are you after?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[jitter]Hrrgh![/jitter]
[jitter][red]DIE!![/red][/jitter]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Annoying wretch!
[jitter]BE GONE!![/jitter]

name: The Future of Potions?
description:
You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!
It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.

The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?

options.title: Insert Common Potion
options.description: Lose [gold]a Potion[/gold]. Obtain an upgraded [gold]Common Skill[/gold].

pages.description: The tablet was disgusting. There is no hope for the future.

You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!
It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.

The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?

options.title: Insert Common Potion
options.description: Lose [gold]a Potion[/gold]. Obtain an upgraded [gold]Common Skill[/gold].

name: The Lantern Key
description:
You come upon a faintly glowing key and go to pick it up 

「Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don't mind...」

 This person looks like bad news but maybe it's not good to be judgy.

name: The Legends Were True
description:
Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness from above, just as the door slams behind you.

Illuminated before you appears to be a podium with a map on it. You feel compelled to take it.

Suspicious.

options.title: Nab the Map
options.description: [gold]Spoils Map[/gold]を受け取る。

options.title: Slowly Find an Exit
options.description: HPを[red]8[/red]失う。 ランダムな[gold]ポーション[/gold]を[blue]1[/blue]個獲得。

pages.description: What's the worst that could happen? As you grab the map, an opening appears before you on the other side of the room.

As you sneak around the dark, looking for a way out the room starts to violently shake. With a sudden crash, the entire chamber collapses around you.

Barely making it out of the rubble, you find a vial of something useful that must have been hidden in the room.

name: This or That?
description:
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a [gold]suspicious bag of riches[/gold] and a clearly [purple]cursed relic[/purple].

[jitter][blue]「This... or That?」[/blue][/jitter]
a scratched-up voice whispers from below.

options.title: This
options.description: HPを[red]6[/red]失う。 [blue]41-68[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。

options.title: That
options.description: [red]Clumsy[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。 ランダムな[gold]レリック[/gold]を1個獲得する。

pages.description:
You grab the [purple]Cursed Relic[/purple]. As soon as you grasp it, shackles materialize on your wrists.

You hear a [blue][sine]ghostly laughter[/sine][/blue] and a bright [orange]plume of fire[/orange] fills your vision!

The hole and arms are gone.

You grab the bag and as soon as you do, a [blue][jitter]THIRD hand[/jitter][/blue] appears and clutches at you!!

After a [red][jitter]frantic struggle[/jitter][/red], it releases—the arms and the hole have vanished.

name: Tinker Time
description:
Navigating through an [red][sine]endless sea of corpses[/sine][/red], you find a [orange]mad scientist[/orange] scavenging for various scraps.

「Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next [green]atrocity device[/green]! How about it?」

options.title: Accept
options.description: Create a custom card to add to your [gold]デッキ[/gold].

pages.description: 「What kind of tool will help you [red][jitter]kill everyone[/jitter][/red]?」

options.title: Weapon
options.description: Make an Attack with a special effect. Deal [blue]12[/blue] damage.

options.title: Protector
options.description: Make a Skill with a special effect. [blue]8[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る.

options.title: Gadget
options.description: Make a Power with a special effect.

pages.description:
「Excellent choice! Now what should it [sine]DO[/sine]?」
The [orange]scientist[/orange] rubs her hands together with glee.

options.title: Sapping
options.description: Apply [blue]2[/blue][gold]脱力[/gold]. Apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]弱体[/gold].

options.title: Violence
options.description: Hits [blue]2[/blue] additional times.

options.title: Choking
options.description: このターン、カードをプレイするたび、the enemy loses [blue]6[/blue] HP.

options.title: Energized
options.description: Gain [energy:2].

options.title: Wisdom
options.description: Draw [blue]3[/blue] cards.

options.title: Chaos
options.description: Add a random card to your [gold]手札[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue] [energy:1] this turn.

options.title: Expertise
options.description: [gold]筋力[/gold][blue]2[/blue]を得る。 [gold]敏捷[/gold][blue]2[/blue]を得る。

options.title: Curious
options.description: Powers cost [blue]1[/blue] [energy:1] less.

options.title: Improvement
options.description: 戦闘終了時、ランダムなカードを1枚[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。

pages.description:
「Whew! All done. This is for you! Now get out there and [red][jitter]slaughter[/jitter][/red]!!」

Little did you know, that [orange]scientist[/orange] went on to create hundreds of weapons, resulting in several thousand deaths within the Spire.

「Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next [green]atrocity device[/green]! How about it?」

name: Trash Heap
description:
You discover a towering pile of [red][jitter]scrapped weapons[/jitter][/red], [orange]discarded trinkets[/orange], and [purple][sine]other oddities[/sine][/purple]. The massive pile shifts and rumbles, as if growing from within...

If you scavenge from the surface, you may find some decent things. But if you really get in there, you may find some [gold]exotic treasures[/gold].

options.title: Dive In
options.description: HPを[red]8[/red]失う。 Obtain a random forgotten [gold]Relic[/gold] from the past.

options.title: Grab Random Junk
options.description: [blue]100[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得。 Obtain a random forgotten Card from the past.

pages.description:
You spend a decent amount of time wading through the [red][sine]dangerous garbage[/sine][/red] and find a [gold]relic of the past[/gold]!

Why was this thrown out?

You walk around the pile from a safe distance and pick up some [gold]forgotten valuables[/gold] and [purple][sine]oddities[/sine][/purple] here and there.

Why were these created in the first place?

You discover a towering pile of [red][jitter]scrapped weapons[/jitter][/red], [orange]discarded trinkets[/orange], and [purple][sine]other oddities[/sine][/purple]. The massive pile shifts and rumbles, as if growing from within...

If you scavenge from the surface, you may find some decent things. But if you really get in there, you may find some [gold]exotic treasures[/gold].

name: The Trial
description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a [gold]golden archway[/gold], horns blare, [jitter]confetti explodes[/jitter], and [sine]streamers glide[/sine] down from the ceiling!

「Entrant [blue][EntrantNumber][/blue], you are the [green]DECIDER[/green] for today's [gold]Trial[/gold].」

options.title: Accept
options.description: Serve as today's Decider.

options.title: Reject
options.description: [red]You are not allowed to Reject.[/red]

pages.description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a [gold]golden archway[/gold], horns blare, [jitter]confetti explodes[/jitter], and [sine]streamers glide[/sine] down from the ceiling!

「Entrant [blue][EntrantNumber][/blue], you are the [green]DECIDER[/green] for today's [gold]Trial[/gold].」

options.title: Accept
options.description: Serve as today's Decider.

options.title: Reject
options.description: [red]You are not allowed to Reject.[/red]

pages.description: A [green]wealthy-looking merchant[/green], presents his case. He is accused of [red]murder[/red] by one of his rivals. The evidence is thin, and you have a feeling that the man is innocent, but the onlookers seem out for blood.

options.title: DECIDE: Guilty
options.description: [red]Regret[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。 Obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold].

options.title: DECIDE: Innocent
options.description: [red]Shame[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。 [gold]アップグレード[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards.

pages.description:
You rule that all of the man's possessions are to be taken and given as processing fees for the court.
The crowd howls in glee!

You go with your conscience and rule that the man is innocent.
Despite the boos and accusations of being a [sine][purple]「paid-off judge」[/purple][/sine] you feel like you did the right thing.

A [gold]powerful noble[/gold] steps forward. You find a note in your pocket indicating that if you decide innocence you will be handsomely rewarded. The [gold]noble[/gold] barely argues against the [purple]corruption charges[/purple] and gives you a knowing smirk.
You can't stop corruption but you can pocket some [gold]gold...[/gold]

options.title: DECIDE: Guilty
options.description: HPを[green]10[/green]回復する。

options.title: DECIDE: Innocent
options.description: [red]Regret[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。 [blue]300[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得する。

pages.description:
The [gold]powerful noble[/gold] was [red]beheaded[/red].
One less [purple]corrupt noble[/purple].

You don't [sine][purple]really[/purple][/sine] know that he's guilty... Yeah, that's it!
The [gold]bribe[/gold] has nothing to do with the outcome here. Nope.

A [orange]nondescript woman with a hard-to-read face[/orange] steps forward. She is charged with the crime of [red]theft[/red] and [purple]con-artistry[/purple]. When the woman speaks, you believe her, but ample witnesses attest to her misdeeds.
Both sides of the story are compelling!

options.title: DECIDE: Guilty
options.description: [red]Doubt[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。 Gain [blue]2[/blue] card rewards.

options.title: DECIDE: Innocent
options.description: [red]Doubt[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加。 [gold]変化[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards.

pages.description:
You aren't totally sure, but making the hard choice, you think the evidence is adequate.
Did you really make the right call?

You aren't totally sure, but you have a reasonable doubt.
You don't know if you made the right call, but innocence seems like the better choice.

[jitter]「YOU CANNOT REFUSE!!」[/jitter]

Shouts the [gold]Grand Arbiter of the Courts[/gold].

[jitter]「Those who reject this privilege are penalized with [red]DEATH[/red]. Do you still defy!?」[/jitter]

options.title: Accept
options.description: Give in. Serve as today's Decider.

options.title: Double Down
options.description: [red]Face lethal repercussions.[/red]

name: Unrest Site
description:
You find a secluded [gold]休憩所[/gold] and start a [orange]fire[/orange] to get some rest.
Or so you thought.

Once the fire is started, it begins to swell, reaching not upwards but [sine]sideways[/sine] towards a grove of [purple]oil-seeping trees[/purple].

Should you try resting anyways?

options.title: Rest Anyways
options.description: [green]Heal to full HP.[/green] Receive [red]Poor Sleep[/red].

options.title: Kill the Trees
options.description: 最大HPを[red]8[/red]失う。 ランダムな[gold]レリック[/gold]を1個獲得する。

You find a secluded [gold]休憩所[/gold] and start a [orange]fire[/orange] to get some rest.
Or so you thought.

Once the fire is started, it begins to swell, reaching not upwards but [sine]sideways[/sine] towards a grove of [purple]oil-seeping trees[/purple].

options.description: [green]Heal to full HP.[/green] Receive [red]Poor Sleep[/red].

options.title: Kill the Trees
options.description: 最大HPを[red]8[/red]失う。 ランダムな[gold]レリック[/gold]を1個獲得する。

pages.description:
These trees are [purple]clearly malicious[/purple] so you decide to get rid of them.
Days later, you're covered in [red]ash[/red] and [purple]oily goop[/purple].

A massive flock of little byrd spirits rise from the slain trees and drop a [gold]small box[/gold] at your feet.
[green]「Thank you for freeing us from those trees... [sine]cheep cheep[/sine]!」[/green]

You should really sleep more.

All this adventuring has left you exhausted, and despite the oddities, you decide to sleep.

You toss and turn as the [orange]fire[/orange] roars and crackles through the night. The [purple]disgusting trees[/purple] give off a wretched scent from their pitch-black sap.

You wake up, recovered, but not replenished.

name: Vakuu
description: Give yourself to me and you will be feared as much as I.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Seeking glory in the Spire are we? I have some propositions for you...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: 143. 143 times you’ve been here.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: You realize this [sine]never[/sine] ends?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Do you find it strange that your fellow constructs want you dead?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: If you bring me the Architect’s heart, I will restore your [aqua]companion[/aqua].

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: What’s more important? Your creator or your friend?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Imagine seeing [sine]you[/sine] again after so long.

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text:
[jitter][b]SACRED DEMON![/b][/jitter]
What have you done to me!?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Exactly what you bargained for.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Do the lost tribes weigh on you...?
Vakuu howls with laughter.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: My puppet of puppets... why haven’t you killed the Architect yet?

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: After I kill the Architect, I will kill [jitter][b]YOU![/b][/jitter]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[sine]Yawn[/sine]
I look forward to watching you fail.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: We both seek [sine]vengeance[/sine]. It will have a cost to pay.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: I accept any cost. Every cost for his death.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I know where you got that [sine]Hand[/sine].

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: The Architect has gravely wounded us both.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Get on with it, demon. Show me your contracts.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Straight to business. Very well...

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: A being from the stars? Within these accursed walls?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Do you know of me?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Yes, I think we can help each other.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: More of my power can be yours for a small price.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I don’t think these deals are good. I’m not feeling great.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
You read the contracts thoroughly have you not?
You have signed them with full intent and responsibility no?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Are you not going to fulfill your end of the bargain?
How about another contract? Isn’t that better?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Killer.

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: [sine]...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: This won’t [jitter]end[/jitter] well for you.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Vakuu displays his various contracts to the Silent

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: The Architect is not enough, kill your sisters too!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: [sine]...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: No need for words, we are the same.

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text: Give yourself to me and you will be feared as much as I.

name: War Historian, Repy
description:
An academic is trapped in a [purple]hanging cage[/purple] next to a [gold]treasure chest[/gold].

The academic is muttering about [sine][orange]「One-Time-Use Keys」[/orange][/sine] while furiously writing something.

Looks like you can unlock the [purple]cage[/purple] or the [gold]chest[/gold].

options.title: Unlock the Cage
options.description: Lose [gold]Lantern Key[/gold]. [gold]History Course[/gold]を獲得。

options.title: Unlock the Chest
options.description: Lose [gold]Lantern Key[/gold]. Procure [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Potions[/gold]. Obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold].

pages.description:

The academic is muttering about [sine][orange]「One-Time-Use Keys」[/orange][/sine] while furiously writing something.

Looks like you can unlock the [purple]cage[/purple] or the [gold]chest[/gold].

options.title: Unlock the Chest
options.description: Lose [gold]Lantern Key[/gold]. Procure [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Potions[/gold]. Obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold].

pages.description:
[green]Repy[/green] bows in appreciation as you open the cage. He hands you a [gold]thick leather tome[/gold].

「Those who know not of history are doomed to repeat it. But you seem to know a thing or two about repeats don't you?」

「Not going to free the scholar, [green]Repy[/green]? Based on classic philosophy, you would be considered a [red]moral failure[/red]. That's right, maybe consider the [purple][jitter]LIVING PERSON[/jitter][/purple] that is locked up next time! It is not as if there is a valuable member of society in a [purple][jitter]DIRE PREDICAMENT[/jitter][/purple] or anything!!」

「Look, okay, see how small this cage is!? Why am I complaining? You've already made your unscholarly decision... oh, what's inside there? Some [gold]potions[/gold] and [gold]relics[/gold]? Isn't that just great. [sine]Just great. Really great for you...[/sine]」

[green]Repy's[/green] eyes follow you with disdain as you walk away.

name: Waterlogged Scriptorium
description:
Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a [aqua]withered figure[/aqua] working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are [sine]stuffed[/sine] full of damp scrolls and parchment.

Noticing a patron has entered, the [aqua]scribe-shopkeeper[/aqua] snaps to attention and gestures at some [gold]implements[/gold] arranged on a desk.

options.title: Bloody Ink
options.description: 最大HPが[green]6[/green]増加する。

options.title: Tentacle Quill
options.description: [red]65[/red][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を支払う。カード1枚に、[purple]Steady[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。

options.description: [blue]155[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]が必要。

pages.description:
The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] carefully picks up the vial filled with a [red]bright red ink[/red] and gives it a shake, then gestures with their own hand a dipping motion.

You dip your fingers into the ink and a [green][jitter]jolt of vitality[/jitter][/green] courses through you!

Pleased with your reaction, the [aqua]scribe[/aqua] gives a polite bow and waves you goodbye.

The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] grabs the [gold]prickly sponge[/gold] (it squeaks) and dabs it across your scrolls.

[jitter][blue]*squeak squeak squeak*[/blue][/jitter]

The prickly texture leaves behind [purple][sine]shimmering marks[/sine][/purple] that seem to stabilize the ink...

The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] lifts the [jitter][gold]wriggly quill[/gold][/jitter] and with swift, practiced movements, etches a strange mark unto your head.

The mark [purple][sine]glows bright[/sine][/purple], then vanishes...

name: Welcome to Wongo's
description:
「Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.」 says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.

「Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's,」 they continue, without even looking up.

You have no clue what they are talking about and vow to never return to a Wongo's.

pages.description:
「Um... excuse me you can't just leave without buying something at Wongo's,」 says the clerk with an irritated tone.

You have a [jitter][red]heated[/red][/jitter] debate over customer choice and it leaves you [sine][purple]mentally drained[/purple][/sine].

name: Wellspring
description:
You trace a [jitter]low rumble[/jitter] to its source and find yourself captivated by a tranquil wellspring. The water is an [sine][aqua]emerald green[/aqua][/sine] with clusters of [sine][gold]glowing motes[/gold][/sine].

It looks inviting. What can possibly go wrong?

pages.description:
You emerge from the pool with a slight [red][sine]feeling of unease[/sine][/red].

However, you feel surprisingly refreshed.

Bathing in the [sine][aqua]beautiful water[/aqua][/sine] seems suspicious... you decide to bottle some up instead.

This will come in handy.

name: Whispering Hollow
description:
Making your way through a [red]hollow of dead trees[/red] you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.

Such a [purple]creepy tree[/purple]. It whispers.

[sine][blue]...make exchange.....[/blue][/sine]

options.title: Exchange Gold
options.description: [gold]ゴールド[/gold]を[red]50[/red]失う。 Procure [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Potions[/gold].

options.title: Hug the Tree
options.description: HPを[red]9[/red]失う。 カードを1枚選び、[gold]変化[/gold]させる。

pages.description:
You scatter some [gold]ゴールド[/gold] at the base of the tree and two of the clay vessels drop to the floor soundlessly.

They break open, and contain [green]perfectly intact potions[/green] within.

You nab the potions and flee.

The [blue][sine]whispering[/sine][/blue] compels you to give it [gold]ゴールド[/gold] but you resist and give the tree a big hug instead!

It [red][jitter]thrashes about[/jitter][/red], scratching you with its branches, but eventually calms down. The [green]tree-hugging experience[/green] [gold]transforms[/gold] you.

[purple][sine]...make hug.....?[/sine][/purple]

name: Wood Carvings
description:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

options.title: Bird
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] starter card to [gold]変化[/gold] into [gold]Peck[/gold].

options.title: Snake
options.description: [gold]Enchant[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] card with [purple]スリザー[/purple].

options.title: Locked
options.description: None of your cards can be Enchanted with [purple]Slither[/purple].

options.title: Torus
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] starter card to [gold]変化[/gold] into [gold]Toric Toughness[/gold].

pages.description:
You place the bird carving on the pedestal and the statue's EYES LIGHT UP and you hear a faint ringing within your mind.

[sine]...caw.... caw caaaawww...[/sine]

The pedestal opens and a strange fluid begins to pour out.
Naturally, you drink it all.

pages.description: You place the snake carving on the pedestal and the statue's SCALES LIGHT UP! You feel a bit warm, comfortable, and wobbly.

You place the torus carving on the pedestal and your STOMACH LIGHTS UP as the statue transforms into a piping hot fried confection. An insatiable hunger takes over and you quickly consume the donut.

You feel tougher, but slower.

name: Zen Weaver
description:
You walk through a spider web and [jitter][red]PANIC[/red][/jitter]!
But then, a [sine][blue]wave of calm[/blue][/sine] washes over you...

[sine]「Calm down. I need you to quit fussing up my web.」[/sine]

How did you calm down so quickly?
An [orange]itsy bitsy[/orange] spider abseils down to meet you. It seems willing to impart some techniques for [gold]ゴールド[/gold].

pages.description:
[sine]「Don't... move...」[/sine] mutters the [orange]miniature spider[/orange] as its forelegs begin to [aqua][jitter]glow[/jitter][/aqua].

Then— in a [jitter]rush of jabbing motions[/jitter], pierces you all over!
A sense of weightlessness comes over you. Well worth the money.

[sine]「Visualize your airways staying open... Each breath is meaningful.」[/sine]

You practice the technique in a way that makes sense to you.

The [orange]teeny-weeny spider[/orange] begins a [sine][purple]hypnotic dance[/purple][/sine] and repeatedly chants.

[sine]「Thoughts don't affect reality. Panic is the thought-killer. Follow the plan.」[/sine]

This makes sense to you. Big wise words from a [orange]tiny spider[/orange].
